name: Love infection
description:
A terrible genetic engineering mistake is turning its hosts into mindless husks that fall in love with just about everything they see. It's a slime composed of bacteria that takes over the body, puppeteering it for its own purposes.

My first time making a bot that's a scenario instead of a character! I tried to avoid limiting the user as much a possible. I hope I did a good job!

Anyways, here are the different stages of infection :). I thought about making them the pfp, but it was too long.
